children.content:
This grilled chicken with roasted veggies is my go-to weeknight dinner. Only 380 kcal, 
packed with 42g of protein and tons of fiber. The secret is the lemon-herb marinade — 
it makes the chicken so juicy without extra calories. Takes 25 minutes from start to plate!
